title: Softer Granite
description: This resource pack makes the texture of granite softer and more pleasant to the eyes, adding some smoothness and silkiness to its appearance.
body:
My resource pack for Minecraft is designed to soften the texture of granite, making it more pleasant to the eyes. However, despite this change, the texture of granite remains recognizable and does not differ too much from the original. This allows builders to maintain the overall look of their structures without changing them too radically. In this way, my resource pack provides players with the opportunity to enjoy a more pleasant visual experience without altering the game atmosphere too much.
